title: YMYNY Bookcase, 3 Tier Storage Rack, Plant Rack, Storage Microwave Shelf with Steel Frame, for Living Room, Kitchen, Office, Study Hall, Industrial Style, 40×29×75CM Black HST008B
features: Sturdy structure: The bookshelf consists of three layers of open and particle board and a black metal frame. The stability design of the X-shaped bracket prevents vertical separation of the shelves, and is equipped with an anti tipping device and adjustable feet to stabilize on a horizontal surface.
Large storage space: A sturdy shelf top can accommodate a microwave or other kitchen utensils. The second/third layer can store toasters, spices, dishes, and anything else you want.
Multipurpose: Can be used as a microwave rack in the kitchen, office storage rack, bookshelf, storage rack, bathroom, entrance, bedside as a bedside table, and so on. Size: 40L x 29W x 75H CM.

Easy to assemble and clean: This practical shelf requires self assembly. The required tools are included in the software package. Based on easy to understand instructions, you can assemble it quickly and easily. Using a damp cloth can easily remove dirt and stains on a smooth surface.

Satisfied service: We always provide you with professional customer service before and after purchase. Our vintage display stand is an excellent way to showcase collectibles, now enjoy your life with this product!
description: Product Description Spacious Desktop Solid Structure Space saving 360 ° Adjustable Feet
